answer_en:
Head of humerus located superiorly and directed medially (articulates with the glenoid fossa of the scapula)
Olecranon fossa located posteriorly (there are two fossae anteriorly)

labels.note: located superiorly and directed medially (articulates with the glenoid fossa of the scapula)
located posteriorly (there are two fossae anteriorly)

title: Posterior View of Humerus (Left Side)
